signals.headline: **Blockade activation**: US military blockade of Strait of Hormuz took effect around midnight Australian Eastern time on
signals.raw: **Blockade activation**: US military blockade of Strait of Hormuz took effect around midnight Australian Eastern time on April 14, 2026 (late April 13 UTC), following collapsed direct talks in Pakistan led by VP J.D. Vance; no agreement reached due to Iran's nuclear ambitions[1][2].

signals.raw:
Bank of Korea Holds Rate at 2.5% (April 10 Decision) | NO | HIGH confidence**  
BoK kept its benchmark rate unchanged for the 7th month on April 10, citing inflation above 2% target (recently 2.2%), oil price risks from Middle East conflict, weak won (near 1,520/USD), and growth below 2% forecast; now expects headline inflation to exceed prior 2.2% projection.[5][6] Unanimous decision flags no nea
